description: Style NoteThis beautifully toned pair from catwalk are great to tone down a blingy ensemble or class up a simple monochrome theme. We love the colour patterning and overall design aesthetic of this lovely pair. Buy now before we run out of stock!Product DetailsBronze sandals with a thong style strap with crystal embellishments and a toe separatorSmooth footbed with golden print and branding embossed on the heelPlastic outsole with textured grooves on the forefoot and an upraised heelMaterial and CarePlastic and syntheticWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlightSizeHeel: 2"
